author: gb9t
content: Iteration 6: google/gve.md committed (b774e40, 222 lines). Google gVNIC — every modern GCE instance. Two-mode descriptor architecture (GQI legacy QPL + DQO zero-copy DMA with header-data split) mapped to Rust enum QueueMode with exhaustive kCFI-signed NAPI dispatch. Grsec posture: Andromeda-host-as-adversary (parallel to ENA's Nitro-as-adversary): device_options TLV opcode allowlist, QPL slot validation in fast path (closes historical compromised-hypervisor UAF class), DQO buf_id bounds-check, reset rate-limit, MSI-X management vector pinned. Cloud-perimeter NIC coverage now: ENA (AWS) + gVNIC (GCP). Next iteration target: drivers/net/ethernet/microsoft/mana/ — Azure MANA (200 Gbps Azure NIC, completes cloud big-three).
